zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Reynell VII於大約1355年出生在英國時，他的父親John Reynell76歲，母親Maud Fulbourn42歲。他於1376年之前與Agnes結婚。他去世於1423年之後在英國戴文黑福德。

nameMeanings.name: Reynell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Reynold
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Anglo-Norman French and Middle English personal name Reinald, Reynaud (ancient Germanic Raginald, from ragin ‘counsel, decision’ + wald ‘rule, ruler’), first introduced to England by Scandinavian settlers in the Old Norse form Rögnvaldr (see Ronald ) and greatly reinforced after the Conquest by the Norman forms Reinald and Reynaud, which often appear Latinized as Reginaldus. The surname was later much confused with Raynor and Renard . The surname is occasionally also borne by Jews, in which case it presumably represents an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Reynell VII was born about 1355, in England, his father, John Reynell, was 76 and his mother, Maud Fulbourn, was 42. He married Agnes before 1376. He died after 1423, in Sherford, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Reynell VIIが約1355年にイギリスで生まれた時，父John Reynellは76歳，母Maud Fulbournは42歳であった。1376年以前にAgnesと結婚した。彼は1423年以後にイギリスデボンシェルフォードで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Reynell VII(이)가 대략 1355년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Reynell(은)는 76세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Fulbourn(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1376년 이전 Agnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1423년 이후 영국 데폰 셔퍼드에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Reynell VII родился около 1355 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени John Reynell было 76 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Fulbourn, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes перед 1376 г. Он умер после 1423 г. в местности ширфорд, девон, Англия.
